subject: Snover, a small tree-like creature with a white snowy cap and green leaf-like appendages, standing on a snowy ground
description: A small, round creature resembling a young tree or snowman stands on a snow-covered ground. It has a broad, pale body with green wing-like or leaf-like limbs on either side and a white rounded cap on top suggesting a snow-capped crown. Snow-covered pine trees fill the background under a wintry sky. The mood is calm and wintry, the creature appears still and content in its cold habitat.
background: snow-covered pine trees and grey winter sky
emotion: calm, placid stance, appears at ease in the cold environment
